caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "I CAN NEVER DO STUPID" is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with a white mannequin dressed in a white shirt and a rack of colorful clothing visible in the background. The wall behind him is decorated with several framed photographs. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and smiling, with his facial expressions shifting slightly as he talks. Small logos appear in the bottom corners of the view, including one that reads "SINE" in a circular badge and another that says "SOLE FLY" in red. The camera remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up as he interacts with someone off-screen.
